title: How much edit experience should the model receive?
decision: Reject data/K selection and local-loss reweighting because both remain action-blind; test direct observed-step attention once before retiring the state family.
plain_summary: Ten jobs completed across two rounds. Exact local targets are well separated, but all four local-loss variants remain at chance action assignment, lose to persistence, and damage rank. The bottleneck is the pooled state interface, not too little local-loss weight.
